title: Codex Route Continuity Fearless Refactor
problem: Fallback-sticky compact routing now intentionally tries providers without pre-existing affinity, but continuity policy, route target selection, and compact tests remain shallow and duplicated across HTTP and Responses WebSocket.
gates: cargo nextest run -p codex-helper-core -E 'test(route_continuity) | test(route_graph_policy) | test(response_semantics_compact) | test(response_semantics_websocket)'
cargo nextest run -p codex-helper-core -E 'test(response_semantics_compact) | test(response_semantics_websocket) | test(route_unavailable) | test(concurrency)'

continue_policy.notes: RCF-020, RCF-030, RCF-040, and RCF-050 are complete. No residual follow-on is required for this lane.
